Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The ResizePageCount method if the state buffer allows resizing, this allows the number of pages in the buffer to be changed.

ArgumentList.ArgumentListEntry: The new number of pages to allocate for the state buffer.

SubSection.Title: Return value
SubSection.ReturnValue: True if the operation succeeded, false otherwise. An assertion will be raised in debug builds if the result is not tested.
